materials.name: Adamantine-Plated
materials.notes: Immune to critical hits; cannot be broken without magic

materials.name: Portcullis (Iron)
materials.notes: Can be attacked from either side; winch required to raise

materials.name: Bronze Relief
materials.notes: Ornate carvings; likely magically or historically significant

materials.name: Translucent Glass
materials.notes: Can see through; shatters on a hit; DC 13 DEX or take 1d6 slashing

materials.name: Living Root
materials.notes: Regenerates 1 HP/round while alive; vulnerable to fire

materials.name: Bone-Inlaid Wood
materials.notes: Radiates faint necromancy; undead pass freely (treat as open arch)

mechanisms.name: Inward Swing
mechanisms.notes: Opens into the room; can be barricaded from inside

mechanisms.name: Outward Swing
mechanisms.notes: Opens into the corridor; harder to barricade

mechanisms.name: Double Swing (Saloon)
mechanisms.notes: Swings both ways; never locked (treat lock as bar only)

mechanisms.name: Sliding Pocket
mechanisms.notes: Slides into wall; cannot be barricaded or wedged

mechanisms.name: Vertical Guillotine
mechanisms.notes: Slides up; DC 15 Athletics (STR) to hold open manually; drops if released

mechanisms.name: Trapdoor
mechanisms.notes: Set in the floor; DC 12 Perception to notice while walking; DC 11 Athletics to lift

mechanisms.name: Rolling Stone
mechanisms.notes: Heavy disc; DC 16 Athletics (STR) to roll open; grinds loudly (Stealth disadvantage)

mechanisms.name: Pivot (Center-Axis)
mechanisms.notes: Rotates on a center pin; both sides open simultaneously

mechanisms.name: Folding Bifold
mechanisms.notes: Two hinged panels; wide opening (10 ft); noisy if hinges are rusty

mechanisms.name: Iris Mechanism
mechanisms.notes: Mechanical petals open radially; DC 15 Acrobatics to dive through as it closes; powered by gear

special_types.name: Mimic Door
special_types.effect: This is a Mimic (CR 2). DC 14 Perception to notice false seams. It attacks when touched.

special_types.name: False Door (Wall)
special_types.effect: Leads nowhere; conceals a secret passage. DC 16 Investigation to find real mechanism.

special_types.name: Arcane Locked
special_types.effect: Cast Knock or DC 20 Arcana check to open. Force requires DC 25 Athletics.

special_types.name: Teleportation Threshold
special_types.effect: Stepping through teleports the creature to a random room (DM rolls d(n rooms)).

special_types.name: Shimmering Force
special_types.effect: Force barrier; Dispel Magic (DC 14) or deal 20+ radiant/force damage to open.

special_types.name: Speaking Mouth (Sentient)
special_types.effect: Demands the correct password or riddle answer. Wrong answer triggers a Glyph (3d10 thunder, DC 14 DEX half).

special_types.name: Phase Door
special_types.effect: Invisible and intangible to non-spellcasters. Spellcasters pass freely. DC 18 Perception to detect.

special_types.name: Illusionary Door
special_types.effect: Not a real door. Walking through dispels the illusion. DC 16 Investigation to realize beforehand.

special_types.name: Clockwork Geared
special_types.effect: Opens on a rolling timer (rolls d12 for hour). DC 13 Thieves' Tools to override the mechanism.

special_types.name: Puzzle-Locked
special_types.effect: Requires solving a mechanical or magical puzzle. DC 15 Investigation or Arcana to bypass. Failure resets the puzzle.

lock_types.name: Simple Padlock
lock_types.notes: Common; can be smashed off with DC 15 Athletics

lock_types.name: Warded Lock
lock_types.notes: Standard key lock; thieves' tools or key

lock_types.name: Pin Tumbler Lock
lock_types.notes: Thieves' tools; takes 1 minute to pick

lock_types.name: Combination Lock
lock_types.notes: DC 13 Investigation to work out the combination by listening

lock_types.name: Dwarven Double-Bolt
lock_types.notes: Two separate lock cylinders; both must be picked (2 checks)

lock_types.name: Elvish Rune Lock
lock_types.notes: DC 14 Arcana to read the runes; thieves' tools or Knock

lock_types.name: Adamantine Deadbolt
lock_types.notes: Immune to thieves' tools; Knock spell or matching key only

lock_types.name: Blood Lock
lock_types.notes: Requires a drop of the original owner's blood; DC 14 Arcana to identify

lock_types.name: Mindlock
lock_types.notes: DC 16 Insight to read the psychic pattern; immune to thieves' tools

lock_types.name: Arcane Seal
lock_types.notes: Dispel Magic (DC 14) or Knock required; resists force
